desc:
This area is a very different world.  There are portals and hidden things
everywhere.
Builders     : Polar Higgins
Zone         : 238 Crystal Castle
Began        : 1998
Player Level : 22-26
Rooms        : 80
Mobs         : 15
Objects      : 29
Shops        : 0
Triggers     : 16
Theme        :
Plot         :
Links        : 75
Map          : 00
name: Polar/Higgin's Zone Description Room

desc:
This small patch of land lies before a grand lake.  A large crystal castle
can be seen far in the distance towards the middle of the lake.  Many small
footprints can be seen laying about the trail that has lead you to this marvel
of castles.

exits.desc: As you look north you notice that there is nothing but water.
Looking south you see an area leading into the fog.

extra_descs.desc:
You notice that these prints are different creatures.  It appears that they
were drug or have drug themselves into this room and and then walked out.

name: Before the lake

desc:
There is a fine layer of film that rests upon the top of the lake.
Under the lake can be seen small fish and a few pieces of garbage but nothing
important.  Also the sand at the bottom of the lake is not quite sand rather
busted up crystal making it imposable to walk on the bottom of the lake.  Also
algae floats towards the top of the lake making it hard to see up from the
bottom of the lake.

exits.desc: Looking north is nothing but water.
As you look east you see water.

Upon looking south you notice a large patch of ground.  Scattered about are
many small footprints and claw marks.

name: In the lake

desc:
There is a fine layer of film that rests upon the top of the lake.  Under
the lake can be seen small fish and a few pieces of garbage but nothing
important.  Also the sand at the bottom of the lake is not quite sand rather
busted up crystal making it imposable to walk on the bottom of the lake.  Also
algae floats towards the top of the lake making it hard to see up from the
bottom of the lake.

exits.desc: Looking north nothing but fog can be seen
As you look east you see water.
As you look west you see more water.

exits.desc: Upon looking north you see nothing but tons of water.
As you look east you see nothing but sickening water.
As you look west you see more water.

were drug or have drug themselves into this room and and then walked out.

exits.desc: Fog and mist can be seen in the distance.
As you look west you see yet more water.

exits.desc: Fog and mist are the only things to be seen in the distance.
As you look east you see a small patch of land.
As you look west you see more water.

extra_descs.desc:
You notice that these prints are different creatures.  It appears that they
were drug or have drug themselves into this room and and then walked out.

name: In the lake

desc:
Here lies a small patch of land in the middle of the lake.  There is a small
mist that covers the outside of the lake making it unreachable.  You cannot
even see where you come from on the shore side of the lake.  It may be too late
to turn back.  Sand covers the ground here with a small patch of square shaped
grass in the center of the small island.

exits.desc: As you look north you see nothing but nasty water.
As you look west you see more sickening water.
This seems to lead you under the island.

name: Patch of land

desc:
There is a fine layer of film that rests upon the top of the lake.  Under
the lake can be seen small fish and a few pieces of garbage but nothing
important.  Also the sand at the bottom of the lake is not quite sand rather
busted up crystal making it imposable to walk on the bottom of the lake.  Also
algae floats towards the top of the lake making it hard to see up from the
bottom of the lake.  A thick fog covers this area making it hard to see
anything in the distance.

exits.desc: As you look south you notice a small patch of dry land.
As you look west you see nothing but water.

extra_descs.desc:
You notice that these prints are different creatures.  It appears that they
were drug or have drug themselves into this room and and then walked out.

name: In the lake

desc:
Here it is hard to see anything besides what is in the area with you.
There is thick gray fog around everything leaving you wandering where you are
and where to go.  This must be some kind of magic because the fog seems to not
be moving any and it has a strange glow to it.
name: In the fog

desc:
Here it is hard to see anything besides what is in the area with you.
There is thick gray fog around everything leaving you wandering where you are
and where to go.  This must be some kind of magic because the fog seems to not
be moving any and it has a strange glow to it.

name: In the fog

desc:
You find yourself standing before a massive crystal castle.  It seems to be
flawless and very delicate yet very strong in design.  There are many small
crystals poking out from the sides of the castle making it impossable to scale
the wall.  There is a large gate leading into the castle directly to the north.
name: Before the castle

desc:
There are large spider webs and dead insects scattered about.  There is also
a fowl stench that has completely closed you in.  Many nasty bugs crawl around
looking for a crumb of food here . There is a small tunnel leading off into the
north leading you into darkness.

exits.desc: Looking north there is a small tunnel leading north
Leading up is a small patch of land.

extra_descs.desc: There are many small spiders around the room looking for a bite to eat.

name: Under the sand

desc:
This is a very small tunnel barely big enough for one person.  It seems to
have not been used for a very long time . It looks like it was used for an
escape route or maybe for someone to sneak in or out.  There are many carvings
in the wall nothing special but just notches.  Also there are still spide webs
linning the walls.

exits.desc: Looking south you see a small area under a patch of grass.

name: Through the tunnel

desc:
This is a very small tunnel barely big enough for one person.  It seems to
have not been used for a very long time . It looks like it was used for an
escape route or maybe for someone to sneak in or out.  There are many carvings
in the wall nothing special but just notches.  Also there are still spide webs
linning the walls.
name: Through the tunnel

desc:
This is a very small tunnel barely big enough for one person.  It seems to
have not been used for a very long time . It looks like it was used for an
escape route or maybe for someone to sneak in or out.  There are many carvings
in the wall nothing special but just notches.  Also there are still spider webs
linning the walls.  There seems to be the remains of someones skull lying here
on the ground.
name: Through the tunnel

desc:
This is a very small tunnel barely big enough for one person.  It seems to
have not been used for a very long time . It looks like it was used for an
escape route or maybe for someone to sneak in or out.  There are many carvings
in the wall nothing special but just notches.  Also there are still spide webs
linning the walls.
name: Through the tunnel

desc:
This is a very small tunnel barely big enough for one person.  It seems to
have not been used for a very long time . It looks like it was used for an
escape route or maybe for someone to sneak in or out.  There are many carvings
in the wall nothing special but just notches.  Also there are still spide webs

name: Through the tunnel

desc:
This is a very small tunnel barely big enough for one person.  It seems to
have not been used for a very long time . It looks like it was used for an
escape route or maybe for someone to sneak in or out.  There are many carvings
in the wall nothing special but just notches.  Also there are still spider webs
linning the walls.
name: Through the tunnel

desc:
There are many bloody and smelly heads hanging from the walls as if there
were some king of crazed monster living here mutilating anything that steps in
his way.  The heads appear to have been cut off with some kind of dull blade.
Blood lines the floors and mutilated body parts are scattered about.

exits.desc: Looking north reveals a room full of corpses.
Looking to the west appears to be a storage room.
Looking up appears to be the main floor to the castle.
Trap Door

extra_descs.desc:
There are many heads strown across the room with many nasty smells to follow.
These heads appear to have been gnawed off of the owners neck very visiously as
if torn off by animals.

name: Entrance to the castle

desc:
You are in a room full of decaying corpses.  There are many decapitated ones
lying in a big pile on the eastern wall and some without any extra limbs piled
on the northern side.  Also there are a pile of heads stacked up on the western
wall of this room.  There are many nasty smells that come from this room making
anyone who enters want to puke.

exits.desc: Looking south you see the entrance to the castle.

extra_descs.desc:
There are many decapitated corpse strown about the room piled in all corners
of the room.

name: Corpses

desc:
This room has been filled with many small and large boxes.  There are many
things stowed away here, many of which are no good anymore due to the current
rat population.  It appears that noone was ever planning on coming back to get
any of the stored items.

exits.desc: Looking east appears to be the entrance to something.

name: Storage room

desc:
You have entered the treasure room of the castle.  There are many different
piles of coins in one large mass piled up on the floor.  It appears that it was
stored here long ago and forgotten.  The room has many different color banners
posted all around
name: Treasure room

desc:
This room is the beginning of the castle's main floor.  There are pillars
scattered about in a decorative design.  Many pieces of pottery line the walls
atop of many eligant tables.  There are many fine pieses of art and a few
sculptures scattered about making the room appear very eligant to those who
enter the castle.

exits.desc: Looking north appears to lead to an intersection of the castle.
Looking south you see an overview of the lake from the 2nd floor of the castle.
The entrance to the castle appears to be this way.

extra_descs.desc: These pots are very old and fragile but very valuable.
These pillars appear to be made of pure crystal and are about 10 feet tall.

name: Main floor hallway

desc:
This room appears to support you even though you did not think it would.
There are small trees scattered about below and a massive lake just south.
You can see small fish swimming in the lake below.  As you look back you notice
that you can go up into a cubby hole which is very large.

exits.desc: Looking north reveals the main floor entrance.
Looking up you see a large room with a crystal roof and a crystal floor.

name: Outside the castle

desc:
The rug covered floor attracts attention to the center of the floor here.
There is a large picture of a dragon woven into the center of the beautiful
rug.  There are not many decorations here except for the dragon in the center
of the rug. The dragon seems to pull you into some kind of trance.

exits.desc: Looking north you see the northern hallway.
Looking east appears to lead to the eastern hallway.
Looking south appears to lead to the main hallway to the castle.
looking west seems to lead you through the western hallway.

extra_descs.desc:
Looking at this picture woven into carpet seems to put you into a trance
making it hard to believe that this picture is just a picture.

name: Intersection

desc:
This room appears to be in excelent condition as well as the rooms before
it.  There are no decorations here or any kind of art work.  There are bare
walls and tiled floor.  This hallway seems to not be very popular or just not
finished.

exits.desc: Looking west seems to reveal a dead end.

name: Western hallway

desc:
This room seems to be the end of the western
hallway that has lead you thus far.  There are no decorations in this room and
no kind of evidance of inhabitants.  There are many tiles that line the floor
throughout the floor seeming to form a circle.  There are small markings placed
in the circle but you cannot tell what they are for or where thet come from.

exits.desc: Looking east appears to take you to the western hallway.

extra_descs.desc: Looking at the statue you notice that it is a large statue of a wyvern.
There are many scratches forming a small circle in the middle of the tiles.

name: Dead end

desc:
There are many different colors about this room as if it was sprayed with
paint.  There are swirls and different patterns as if some kind of art.  There
are also some misplaced spots on the floor that appear to have dripped from the
roof.  There are no spots on the roof however.

exits.desc: Looking east you notice that this will lead you further down the eastern hallway.
Looking west shows you to the intersection.

extra_descs.desc:
Looking more carefully you notice that these spots appear to be some kind of
tracks leading fomr the roof to the floor.

name: Eastern hallway

desc:
This room appears to be the same as the last except the spots on the floor
are not here.  There are also some small items strewn about the floor
consisting of rat guano, bird feathers, spider webs, and cockroach shells.
There are no traces of anyone ever being here to clean this room or to have
even walked through it because there is a coating of dust on the floor revealing
your tracks as you cross it.

exits.desc: Looking east seems to lead to a dead end.
The eastern hallway is the only thing to the west.

name: Further on the eastern hallway

desc:
This room is about the same as the first room of this hallway very clean and
well kept.  There are not any smudges or any dirt stains of any kind.  It
almost seems that the room is magically maintained and left spotless.  There
are also many tapestries in this room.

exits.desc: Looking north appears to lead you into a dead end.

Looking south leads to lead to the northern hallway.
Looking south you notice that it leads to the Northern hallway.

extra_descs.desc:
The tapestries are very elegant and well kept they are pictures of different
land scapes.

name: Northern hallway

desc:
This appears to be the end of the line for this hallway.  There are still
very eligant pictures and other pieces of art placed about the room here.
Just as before the room is spotlessly clean.  There are no traces of anything
in this room.

exits.desc: Looking south seems to lead you into the northern hallway.

extra_descs.desc:
These pictures seem to be people but they are slightly blurred when you try
to focus on them.

name: Dead end

desc:
This area seems to have been also cleaned even though it was very well
hidden.  There are no traces of life and no way to get back up.  There are many
cobblestones linning the floor to make it appear as if the floor here was the
bottom of the fountain.

exits.desc: Looking north leads you further down the hidden hallway.

name: Hidden hallway

desc:
This room is as clean as the rest but from here you can see the top of the
clouds when you look down.  The floor appears to be the great sky above.  The
roof however appears to be the top of a mountain pointing top down towards you.

exits.desc: Looking north you see the sky and clouds floating through the room ahead.
Looking south seems to lead you toward the beginning of the hidden hallway.

extra_descs.desc:
The mountain looks as if it may fall any second probably because this is not
the way you usually see them.
This really looks like the real sky except it is sturdy and can hold you up.

name: Further on the hidden hallway

desc:
You have entered a remarkable room placed above the clouds except for the
fact that you cannot walk you you have to fly.  There are birds and clouds
drifting about in the distance.  The only thing you can see is clouds and the
blue sky above.

exits.desc: Looking north you see what looks like what could be nearing the end of the hallway.
Looking south you see solid ground leading back to the beginning of this hallway.

name: Walking through the sky

desc:
You have set foot on solid ground again.  The room here looks exactly the
same as the first and you can see what looks like the first room ahead to the
north.  There are many fine pictures on the walls here.  Also the floor seems
to be made of some kind of deep brown wood.

exits.desc: Looking north you see the end of the hallway.
Looking south you see the open sky.

name: Near the end

desc:
You have finally made it to the end of this god forsaken hallway.  There are
no more posters or and kind of decoration here just walls a floor and a
ceiling, which you much appreciate.  The walls, floor, and ceiling appear to be
made of wood.

exits.desc: Looking north you see a room with 3 large sparkling items.
Looking south you can see more hallway.

extra_descs.desc:
The troll's marking appear to be those of Lords Of Pain signifying power and
courage.

name: The end

desc:
Upon entering this room you notice a large green portal standing on the
northern wall in this room shimmering in the darkness.  There are no
decorations in this room but the room seems to have a green tint to it.

exits.desc: Looking south you see a long hallway.

name: Portal room

desc:
You have entered the portal and have yet to find anything but blue glowing
strongly around you.  You walk along whap seems to be a floor but is nothing
but light from the portal.  There are many small spots floating around the
portal around you.

exits.desc: Looking north appears to lead you further into the portal.

extra_descs.desc:
There are many small spots that appear to be some kind of smaller portals
inside of the big portal.

name: Through the blue portal

desc:
This appears to be some kind of swirling vortex that you can freely travel
through.  There are small spots that line the walls here.  Many particles float
about bumping into you at times making a spark.  There is no floor, roof, or
walls here to guide y

exits.desc: Looking north reveals another part of the portal.

extra_descs.desc:
Looking in for further examination you see that they are balls of energy, as
you turn back one pops you in the face OUCH!!!!!

name: Through the red portal

desc:
This room appears to have a green tint to every part of the entire room.
There are green posters covering the walls and very small green spots strown
about.

exits.desc: Looking east seems to lead you to another portal room witha blue aurora.

name: Through the green portal

desc:
This room has a large blue portal against the far northern wall.  This room
has a blue tint to the room and has no decorations or designs anywhere on the
room.  The portal seems to have placed a blue aurora about the room.
name: Portal room

desc:
This room has a large red portal placed on the northern wall and also has a
tint of red thruought the entire room.  There are no decorative items or any
kind of other decorations.  The room is very plain except for the portal
itself.
name: Portal room

desc:
There are still all the small spots floating around but the floor seems to
be taking shape more now.  There are no walls or a roof but the floor is
beginning to get harder and more sturdy.

exits.desc: Looking north shows you further into the portal .
Looking south shows you to the area where you come into the portal.

name: Further in the blue portal

desc:
There are still all the small spots floating around but the floor seems to
be taking shape more now.  There are no walls or a roof but the floor is
beginning to get harder and more sturdy.

exits.desc: Looking north shows you more portal.
To the south is toward the beginning of the portal.

name: Further in the blue portal

desc:
There are still all the small spots floating around but the floor seems to
be taking shape more now.  There are no walls or a roof but the floor is
beginning to get harder and more sturdy.  The floor appears as a solid floor
now.

exits.desc: Looking north reveals the kings throne.
Looking south shows you the area that leads to the beginning of the portal.

name: Further in the blue portal

desc:
You have entered the kings chamber.  You are surrounded by gold and silver
everywhere.  The tapestries that line the wall are trimmed in gold.  The floor
you walk on is made of silver.  And the roof you look at is made of titanium.
There is nothing mis

exits.desc: Looking south reveals the tunnel you came from.

name: Kings chamber

desc:
This area appears the same as the last except for the little floating
objects that cause the sparks when you bump them are very scarce here.  The
floor is beginning to harden and the walls are beginning to show.

exits.desc: Looking north reveals an exit leading further into the portal.
Looking south appears to lead you into the room that you entered from.

name: Further through the red portal.

desc:
The wals here are shimmering and swirling making a beautiful mass of colors
and patterns.  The walls appear to be unreachable but also right beside you.
The floor is hard and solid now just the walls appear unstable.

exits.desc: Looking north shows you the end of this portal.
Looking south shows you a continuation of the portal room.

name: Far into the red portal.

desc:
This area seems to be very rich in color and loaded with the small
particals.  There are many different colors flowing throught the the walls
making it a sight to see.  The spots appear to be avoiding you now saving you a
heart ache.

exits.desc: Looking north you see the queens room.
Looking south reveals the portal you came from.

name: Towards the end

desc:
This room is very eligant from top to bottom.  There are many decorative
pieces of art in this room revealing the elegant tastes of royalty.  The queens
throne is perched atop a large golden square.  The throne itself seems to be
made of gold and silk.

exits.desc: Looking south you see the portal that you came from.

extra_descs.desc:
Made of solid gold linned with silk this throne appears to be a very eligant
sitting.

name: Queen plegia's room

desc:
You are walking through a a small trail which seems to lead to nothing.
The road has changed here and seems to be less bright and more spooky.  The
area is still good and the land is fertile but the air around seems very weird.

exits.desc: Looking east the road begins to blur and you can not see far into the distance.

name: South road

desc:
This area seems to be very odd.  There are many odd sounds and different
smells.  There are no animals here but you can hear the sounds of animals in
the distance.  There is a small fog rolling in which stretches farther to the
east.

exits.desc: Looking east you can see nothing except fog.
Looking west you see the southern road.

name: Towards the lake

desc:
There is a heavy fog here which disallows you to see anything except the
exits to the rooms ahead.  The fog appears to be implied by some kind of
magical force.  The sounds of animals are no longer heard and no evidence of
life are present.
name: In the fog

desc:
There is a heavy fog here which disallows you to see anything except the
exits to the rooms ahead.  The fog appears to be implied by some kind of
magical force.  The sounds of animals are no longer heard and no evidence of
life are present.
name: In the fog

desc:
There is a heavy fog here which disallows you to see anything except the
exits to the rooms ahead.  The fog appears to be implied by some kind of
magical force.  The sounds of animals are no longer heard and no evidence of
life are present.

exits.desc: Looking east you see a large area before a great lake.

name: In the fog

desc:
You stand here in front of a massive lake.  There are many small animals
scattered about looking as if they want to get out but cannot.  There are many
different smells surrounding the area.

exits.desc: Looking north you see the area before the lake.
Looking west you see into the fog.

name: A Clearing Before the Lake

desc:
You have entered a large room with very little decorations and no kind of
art.  There are claw marks and very large holes in the walls and ceiling
around.  The floor is very hard and seems to be composed of crystal.  The roof
is also made of the same materials.

exits.desc: Looking down you see the rocks in front of the castle.

extra_descs.desc:
Looking in for a closer look you see that these scratches are from some kind
of animal.

name: Dragons Lair
